title: Status column width changed to text width not fixed size?
excerpt:

posts.author: johnners (Drew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, Has anyone else’s status column widths changed this morning??

All ours are now set to the width of the text, rather than the width of the column and it looks awful (Plus we have some blank status’s - just using the colour).

Is this a mistake or is this a new “Improvement”?

posts.author: IanHas (Ian Haselden)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, yes, we have the same on our account but only on Mirror columns. Hoping it’s a glitch that gets fixed soon.

posts.author: IanHas (Ian Haselden)
posts.cookedHtml: This is now fixed on our account
